## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include code examples if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, mockups, or examples from other libraries.
